title: struthiopteris distans
intro: Struthiopteris distans, also known as the fern- like plant, is a type of lycopod that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Struthiopteris distans are typically available in the form of teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
